_disclaimer: Eligibility thresholds below are ILLUSTRATIVE and simplified for this demonstration. They are not authoritative benefits advice and must be verified against official sources (myscheme.gov.in and the relevant ministry) before any real use. This dataset exists to demonstrate the agent + eval + optimizer system, not to provide legal eligibility determinations.
_rulebook_note: This file is the editable rulebook. A domain expert can add a scheme or change a threshold here and the agent picks it up on the next run, with no code change. See data/rulebook_guide.md.

schemes.name: PM-KISAN
schemes.summary: Income support for landholding farmer families.
schemes.benefit: Rs 6,000 per year in three instalments.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban)
schemes.summary: Credit-linked subsidy and assistance for urban housing for eligible income groups.
schemes.benefit: Interest subsidy / assistance toward a first pucca house.
documents: Proof that no pucca house is owned

schemes.name: Post-Matric Scholarship (SC/ST)
schemes.summary: Scholarship for SC/ST students studying post-matriculation.

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.summary: Small-savings scheme for a girl child opened by a guardian.
schemes.benefit: High fixed interest savings account with tax benefits.

schemes.name: PM Mudra Yojana
schemes.summary: Collateral-free loans for non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
schemes.benefit: Loans up to Rs 10 lakh across Shishu/Kishore/Tarun categories.

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension (NSAP)
schemes.summary: Monthly pension for senior citizens from below-poverty-line households.

schemes.name: Stand-Up India
schemes.summary: Bank loans for greenfield enterprises set up by SC/ST or women entrepreneurs.
schemes.benefit: Loan between Rs 10 lakh and Rs 1 crore for a new enterprise.

schemes.name: PM SVANidhi
schemes.summary: Working-capital micro-loans for urban street vendors.
schemes.benefit: Collateral-free working capital loan with interest subsidy.

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana
schemes.summary: Guaranteed pension scheme aimed at unorganised-sector workers.
schemes.benefit: Fixed pension from age 60 based on contributions.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
schemes.summary: Basic no-frills bank account with accident insurance and overdraft.
schemes.benefit: Zero-balance account, RuPay card, accident cover.
documents: Aadhaar or any officially valid document
